files.content:
<button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium tracking-wide text-white transition-colors duration-200 rounded-md bg-neutral-950 hover:bg-neutral-900 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:shadow-outline focus:outline-none">
    Button
</button>

visual_summary: A clickable button with a neutral background that turns darker on hover and has white text.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button
Description: A clickable button with a neutral background that turns darker on hover and has white text.
Style: rounded, neutral, darker_on_hover
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: ui, button, clickable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// elements/button.html
<button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium tracking-wide text-white transition-colors duration-200 rounded-md bg-neutral-950 hover:bg-neutral-900 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:shadow-outline focus:outline-none">
    Button
</button>
